modifications.change: ADDITIVE: + funnel.first_non_hold_verdict (activation 'aha' quality signal — COUNT DISTINCT session_id of free sessions reaching their first BUY/SELL). NOT a CANONICAL_STAGE_ORDER stage; stage_retentions stays 13 transitions; no key removed (Data-Integrity additive-only).

ADDITIVE: + pql_cohort (C3 scored PQL cohort; env-thresholded PQL_* with default-deny on NaN; fail-open → empty cohort, never 500s). candidate_ref is an 8-char ip_hash PREFIX only — the raw ip_hash is NEVER exposed (it stays a forbidden key).

auth: Bearer token via Authorization header OR ?key= query param OR admin session cookie; matches existing isAdminAuthorized() pattern in src/index.ts:1109
forbidden_keys_rationale: Per CLAUDE.md `## Data Integrity (THE LAW)` rule `Outcome WR is internal only`: outcome_return_pct + outcome_price + Phase E numbers are NEVER exposed via any MCP/HTTP surface. Per `feedback_no_internal_details_in_public_copy` LAW: PII (session_id, ip_hash, customer_email) + secrets (admin_key, license_key, stripe_customer_id, telegram_bot_token, DATABASE_URL) MUST NOT appear in any response body. Endpoint is admin-gated but still subject to these no-leak rules.

401.trigger: isAdminAuthorized(req) returns false (no Bearer header, no ?key= query, no valid admin session cookie)

400.trigger: ?window= query param is not in the allowed set

500.trigger: generateFunnelSnapshot() throws (e.g. DB unreachable + data-quality gate fires: all 3 critical fields null). Detail logged to stderr via console.error, NOT returned in response body (no error-message leak).

cache_contract.rationale: Admin endpoint always serves fresh data; never cache (per existing /dashboard + /performance admin-endpoint conventions in src/index.ts).

consumers.name: operator manual probe
consumers.consumes: JSON response shape end-to-end via jq

consumers.name: /opt/algovault-monitoring/funnel-leak-detector.py
consumers.consumes: stage_retentions map (computes WoW deltas) + weakest_stage_transition (alert body) + funnel.* fields (numerator/denominator validation)

consumers.name: scripts/funnel-snapshot.ts CLI
consumers.consumes: Same FunnelSnapshot interface (lib-extracted, see src/lib/funnel-snapshot.ts). HTTP endpoint is convenience wrapper; CLI remains canonical for weekly systemd-timer snapshots.

consumers.name: OPS-ACTIVATION-LEAK-FIX-W1
consumers.consumes: weakest_stage_transition.from + .to fields identify the leak step; spec author drafts the fix wave around the named transition

drift_check_command: curl -fsS -H "Authorization: Bearer $ADMIN_API_KEY" 'https://api.algovault.com/api/admin/funnel-snapshot?window=7d' | jq -r '"DRIFT_CHECK_OK" as $ok | (.funnel | keys | length) as $fk | (.stage_retentions | keys | length) as $sr | if $fk == 16 and $sr == 13 and (.window_label == "7d") and (.weakest_stage_transition != null or (.warnings | length > 0)) then $ok else ("DRIFT_CHECK_FAIL: funnel keys=\($fk) (expected 16); stage_retentions keys=\($sr) (expected 13); window_label=\(.window_label) (expected 7d)") end'
drift_check_notes: Run monthly OR after any wave touching scripts/funnel-snapshot.ts / src/lib/funnel-snapshot.ts / src/index.ts /api/admin/funnel-snapshot handler. Asserts: funnel object has exactly 16 keys (5 legacy + 11 new), stage_retentions has exactly 13 transitions, window_label echoes correctly, weakest_stage_transition is present OR warnings array has at least one entry (the latter handles fresh-DB cases where all stages are null/0 and no transition can be picked).
